title: Compute and cache generated column dependencies eagerly
Update rand crate to 0.8.6
Introduce BTree constructor and RAII mutation guard
Introduce an Identifier type
replace container types with BitSet
Add CREATE TABLE AS SELECT support
[wip] vacuum stuff
replace HashSet<usize> with ColumnMask
allow -ve array indices and [#] path in jsonb,update sqlite to 3.53 and fix issues caused due to it.
Remove most of the remaining blocking I/O from core
replace TableMask with BitSet
fix(numeric): replace decompose_float with stdlib format! for correct rounding
MVCC stale row version fix during Checkpoint
core/vdbe: refactor `vacuum into` state machine
Add STRUCT and UNION composite types for STRICT tables
fix(numeric): replace decompose_float with stdlib formatting in format_float
fix(numeric): replace decompose_float with stdlib formatting in format_float
MVCC: remap root page ids so that we don't miss rows on recovery
fix: use round-half-away-from-zero for ROUND() with precision > 0
Implement Temporary tables
fix: json_valid() enforces strict RFC 8259 instead of accepting JSON5
fix: round() uses away-from-zero for midpoints instead of banker's rounding
fix: reject invalid UTF-8 TEXT payloads in record decode
fix: unhex(X, Y) ignores separator characters inside the input
Add SQLite TCL conformance tests to CI
core/translate: Fix INSERT column-count mismatch error message to match SQLite
Fix various error messages for trigger, insert, join, and functions based on TCL tests
core/vdbe: fix `VACUUM INTO` correctness bugs
Fix DELETE with index generated column
core: Implement initial support for multi-process database access
core: Switch to file ID for database registry mapping
fix: mark expression-index columns in col_used_mask during UPDATE planning
core: Drop `DATABASE_MANAGER` lock after lookup
core/connection: use `ATTACH` in `VACUUM INTO`
Add statement origin tracking
core/translate: Enforce FK constraints on virtual generated columns with UNIQUE INDEX
core/mvcc: Make MVCC encryption less memory hungry with chunking
Fix column quoting issues
Implement ALTER TABLE for virtual columns
bindings/rust: make sync parallel writes test tolerate busy locks
feat: Add ForeignDataWrapper trait for querying external data sources
Add COMMENT ON support for database objects
core/translate: Handle ORDER BY/GROUP BY +N as column index reference
core/mvcc: Keep MVCC schema version immutable
simulator: introduce yield injections 💉 for mvcc at safe resumable boundaries
perf: Implement Grace algorithm for hash joins to improve disk-spilling performance
Introduce binding + scoping phase before planning
Optimizer tuning again
core/mvcc: Fix abandoned transactions leaving their effects
Fix ORDER BY NULLS FIRST/LAST handling
fix: use libm for production math functions to match SQLite precision
perf/translate: more optimizer bugfixes
Preserve cached expression collations without leaking aggregate/window state
fix: BEFORE UPDATE trigger does not fire when OR IGNORE suppresses violation
fix: Duplicate trigger names accepted instead of being rejected
Preserve rowid values in VACUUM INTO output
core/mvcc: Enable encryption with MVCC
optimizer: restructure access path selection to unify single-index and multi-index paths
Preserve non-UTF8 TEXT bytes end-to-end and match SQLite text semantics
optimizer: support IN (list / uncorrelated subquery) as driver of scan+seek
Reject outer-scope refs in GROUP BY subquery trees
core/translate: main_loop refactor
perf: only use statement subjournal when it is actually required
core/vdbe: finalize MVCC commit state machine on abort
core/mvcc: encryption plumbing for MVCC logical log
Arrays
Fix subquery evaluation timing
mvcc: fix autoincrement handling
core/mvcc: experimental_group_commit_delay_us
